titleStmt.title: SII 38.370: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 370. (A.R. No. 370 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇayadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1450, ŚArvadhāri, Āṉi, śu. Uttiram. Monday = irregular.
p.note: The Annual Report fixed the date on Monday, 22nd June 1528 A.D. It is assumed śu. 5. Even in this date the star is not tallied.

summary.p: This inscription records the supply of one padakku of ghee every year by (the measure) śūlakkāl for a lamp to the god Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār at Dēvakkapuram, a dēvasthānam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu, by the two shepherds (residing at) Kailāyam, Nūrkaṇaṉ and Sevvaṇṇaṉ. The temple accountant Uttaṇḍi, who had this epigraph engraved, tāṉattār, māyēsvarar and Kaḷappāḷar Kāliṅgarayar, the Kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śusavasitaśrīRead svastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecurametiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuvakakṣaṇaiyakiruṣṇatevateva makāyirāyar piṟutiviyirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 mel cellā niṉṟa
cāṟuvatārivaruṣattu pūṟuvapakṣattu Āṉimātamum Uttiramum peṟṟa comavārattu nāḷ murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram tirumalaruṭaiyanāyiṉāṟku tiruviḷakkutiruviḷakkuk
kum Āka namacivāyanāyakkar Ayyaṉ taṉmam Āka viṭṭa kayilāyattil yirukku maṉṟāṭikaḷil kāṭṭuayyappu makaṉ ṉūrkkaṇṉum cevvaṇṇaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟkum cāta(ta)kaṭamai kāṇi
kku varuṣam 1 kku Aṉṟāṭu cūlakkālil neyi 0 yinta neyipatakkum varuṣamtoṟu Aḷantu cukattileyirukka kaṭavar Ākaṣaākavuyinta taṉmattukku yātoruvar
Akutam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile kāraāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile
pokak kaṭaivar Ākavumyippaṭikku yintakkalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu
Ivai tāṉattār Eḻuttu māyecurar Eḻuttu kaikkoḷamutaliyaḷ kaḷappāḷar kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
